texto: Soon I find myself squatting on the floor. I am still striking my face; not with my fists this time, but with wide-open hands. I am slapping myself. The sounds I make when my palms meet my cheeks are like an unrelenting round of applause. I am clapping myself. Or clapping for myself. I start to giggle.All the voices are receding now. I am no longer filled with rage or disappointment. I clap and clap and simply cannot stop.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Cyril Wong: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “Soon I find myself squatting on the floor. I am still striking my face; not with my fists this ti…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que saude-mental, cyril-wong, fiction pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de fiction e mental-illness.

texto: I mostly believe, deep in my bones, that life is very simply beyond description; regardless of what one makes of it, life always spills over the parameters of how anyone has chosen to define it.
explicacao: Citação de Cyril Wong sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “I mostly believe, deep in my bones, that life is very simply beyond description; regardless of wh…” articula reflexao, cyril-wong, debut em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como debut e fiction.

texto: If this turns to friendship, it only meansThat one of us will suffer.That when we meet after the worst of endings,There will only be this skein of words between us—Most of them for boredom, fewer for loneliness—Rising out of our mutual space of breath, leavingBehind a bluer sky each moment of departure.And one of us will cling on to its blue,Hung on partings like a muted cloud, whileThe other rides on a wing of word away from here.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Cyril Wong: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “If this turns to friendship, it only meansThat one of us will suffer.That when we meet after the …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que amizade, absence, below-absence pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de termino e below-absence.
